sentences.english: Thanks for sitting down with me, Tom.
Let's go over your performance for this quarter.
I've been looking forward to getting some feedback.
Overall, your performance has been strong.
The client satisfaction scores on your projects are consistently above average.
sentences.korean: 프로젝트의 고객 만족도 점수가 꾸준히 평균 이상이에요.

quiz.question: What does '인사 평가' mean in English?

sentences.english: Is there anything I should work on?
One area for improvement is delegation.
You tend to take on too much yourself, which leads to working overtime and sometimes missing smaller deadlines.
sentences.korean: / 그래서 야근하게 되고 / 가끔 작은 마감을 놓치게 돼요.

sentences.english: I've been trying to delegate more, but I sometimes feel like it's faster to just do it myself.
sentences.korean: 더 위임하려고 노력하고 있는데 가끔 직접 하는 게 더 빠른 것 같아서요.

sentences.english: I understand, but investing time in training your team now will save you much more time in the long run.
sentences.korean: 이해해요. 하지만 지금 팀 교육에 시간을 투자하면 장기적으로 훨씬 더 많은 시간을 절약할 거예요.
